---
title: "Host-informed disease risk mapping"
---

# Host-informed disease risk mapping

Using host ecology, spatial models, and uncertainty propagation to improve predictions of schistosomiasis risk and guide multispecies survey design.

## Project angle

This project asks how knowledge of intermediate host distributions can improve disease-risk prediction and identify where uncertainty limits inference.

## Methods and outputs

- Species distribution models
- Host-informed risk mapping
- Uncertainty propagation
- Survey-priority mapping
- Reproducible spatial workflows

## Publications / outputs

- Propagating uncertainty from biotic interactions in species distribution models guides multispecies survey design. K Mitchell, M Goodman, P Ravoniarimbinina, C Wood, N Lo, et al. 2026.
